mandate: Fix sticky CTA to inline waitlist form, fix dashboard home image blank space, optimize guest list filters for mobile, remove readiness indicator from nav
keyFindings: The mobile sticky CTA was a simple Link to /sign-up; replaced with an inline name+email form that posts to /api/waitlist
The hero image div used display:none on mobile but still occupied a grid cell; conditional rendering eliminates the empty space
Guest list filters used flex-wrap which broke on narrow screens; switched to column layout with proper 44px touch targets on mobile
Readiness indicator in sidebar footer was 15 lines of JSX removed entirely
whatWorked: Targeted edits using the Edit tool kept changes minimal and verifiable. TypeScript compiled clean on first pass.
recommendationsForNextAgent: The waitlist table in Supabase may not have a 'name' column yet. A migration should be created to add it (ALTER TABLE waitlist ADD COLUMN name text). The API gracefully handles missing name (sends null) so this is non-blocking.
spiritContribution: Mobile experience polished for marketing launch readiness. Waitlist form now captures richer lead data.
